remarks: You've found it! Desirable Prospect Garden complex in prime, central location! This sun-filled 2 bedroom unit has been freshly painted and is ready to move right in or great for an investor! Enjoy a modern eat-in kitchen with stylish backsplash and counters, plus ample cabinetry. Wood floors throughout. Two generously sized bedroom with double closets. Remodeled full bathroom. Enjoy HEAT & HOT WATER INCLUDED in the HOA, along with reserved parking included and plenty of visitor spaces. This unit also has ample storages space in the lower level. Enjoy on site laundry. Conveniently located in the heart of Norwalk, close to the Train Station, Stew Leonard's, Wegmans, Norwalk Hospital, restaurant, coffee shop, SoNo Collection Mall and of course convenient to NYC. I-95 and Rte 7 access is perfect for commuters. Pets allowed. Hurry! Won't last!
